forecast.last_chart_read_verdict: 🟡 DOWNTREND-INTACT, MILD-OVERSOLD BOUNCE (QT+MACRO+FLOW+CREDIT synthesis 260625) — the 2.618 fib blowoff top ($120.36) has unwound -52% to ~$57 XAG; price HOLDS above the $48.18 1.0-fib / 40-yr breakout. GSR rising 44->69.75 (silver the WEAKEST metal); DXY ~101 + USD-INR firm = near-term LIQUIDATION-leaning. Structural debasement thesis INTACT above $47; invalidation = sustained daily close <$47. The final ~20k tranche waits for the $50-53 floor zone (1.115 fib + rising-diagonal + box + arc), DXY-102-104-apex conditional. COT on the latest canonical F&O cut (06-09 MM-net +9.8K, 26th pctile, washed-out); Thursday COT not yet dropped (using cached as-of, not fabricated).

bull_case: 🐂 ~22% — Physical TIGHT 4/5 reasserts: deep COMEX backwardation (steepest since the 1980s) + Shanghai premium +$6.91/oz (+10.06%, SGE>London) + elevated lease rates + thin COMEX registered (86.2Moz) = paper-vs-physical bifurcation extreme [goldsilver.ai/SchiffGold 17-18 Jun]
Positioning washed-out: canonical COT MM-net +9.8K (09-Jun survey, 26th pct, << 70K NO-ENTRY) — thin long-liquidation fuel left for a cascade [CFTC #084691]
5th consecutive structural deficit (~67Moz, Silver Institute); credit EASING (CCC OAS 939bp falling) removes one tail
V-14 velocity floor: physical resists STAYING <$65 for weeks — a relief bounce to reclaim $65-69 is the bull path if any macro data softens
Under-deployment is strength: ~₹3.9Cr dry powder buys the F1/F2 zones the ladder always wanted, below the ₹252 blended — once gates re-arm
base_case: ⚖️ ~46% — Chop-and-digest $59-67 while the hawkish-Fed repricing clears; each gold-MM unwind wave drags silver in sympathy
Macro gate firmly shut: CPI 4.2% (>3.9% auto-RED) + Warsh hawkish (hike priced by Oct) + 10Y real yield 2.19% rising + DXY 100.8 fresh high = no new deploys (V-12)
SBees 15% duty premium (~+9%) cushions the INR book vs global spot; family book marked at SILVERBEES ₹221.6 (19-Jun)
Ladder stays gate-BLOCKED until TNX <4.45% + a non-hawkish Fed signal + CPI back <3.9%; do nothing, let the gates decide
Next reads: COT 22-Jun (Juneteenth-delayed), PCE 25-Jun, June CPI ~14-Jul, FOMC 28-29 Jul
bear_case: 🐻 ~32% — Second leg DOWN already underway: F2 $67.87 BROKEN (XAG ~$64.9, Fri 19-Jun daily close) -> 5.3 suspend confirmed; real-yield + DXY grind continues
Gold MM still crowded long — a gold capitulation cascade drags silver to the $55-59 V-14 tail
Market pricing a Fed HIKE by Oct — the entire 2026 'dovish-Fed' silver pillar is inverted until proven otherwise (V-11 realized)
RBI reserves $671.6B now <$680B cushion gate; USDINR structural bias to 100+ — INR-side stress could compound
EXIT-ALL watch: weekly close <$63 (Feb-6 proven low $63.85) — XAG ~$64.9 is CLOSE; V-18 $52 hard stop unconditional

headlines.headline: June US payrolls SHOCK-MISS +57k vs 115k consensus (unemp 4.2%; Apr-May revised -74k) -> Fed-hike bets pushed out, DXY fell, silver rallied. COMEX silver $60.64 (+0.93%), spot ~$61 — ends a 7-week futures losing streak. [Kitco/CNBC/BLS 2-Jul]

Strait of Hormuz REOPENED — tanker traffic back to pre-war (35 exited Thu); oil to pre-war (WTI ~$68.7, Brent ~$71.8); US-Iran 17-Jun MoU holds a fragile 60-day window. Risk/safe-haven premium bleeding out. [CNBC/Al Jazeera 29-Jun/2-Jul]

Silver to the cycle low — broad selloff drove spot briefly under $60 to a ~$57 handle (low ~$57.05); GSR widened back to ~64:1 (reversing May's 55:1). Q3 opened on a reset. [goldsilver/Kitco 30-Jun/1-Jul]

May PCE = 3-year high: headline 4.1% YoY (+0.4% m/m, up from 3.8%); core PCE 3.4% YoY (+0.3% m/m) — hottest core since Oct-2023. Keeps a Fed HIKE in play; hawkish real yields, bearish silver. [Yahoo/BEA 26-Jun]
DXY touched a 14-month high ~101.8 (settled ~101.2) on post-FOMC hawkish repricing — headwind for USD-priced metals + INR; US 10Y ~4.5%. [TradingEconomics/Investing 24-Jun]

India: SILVERBEES (Nippon Silver ETF) ~₹221.3, -11.2% on the month (still +~115% YoY); MCX silver ~₹2,75,500/kg. Mirrors the global correction; INR soft vs a firm dollar. [Tickertape/Goodreturns 3-Jul]

TA SYNTHESIS 260625: 2.618-fib blowoff top $120.36 -> -52% unwind to ~$57; downtrend intact, mild-oversold bounce. Holds above the $48.18 1.0-fib/40-yr breakout. GSR 44->69.75 (silver weakest metal); DXY ~101 + USD-INR firm = liquidation-leaning near-term. Thesis intact >$47; final ~20k tranche waits the $50-53 floor (DXY-102-104 conditional). sr_levels.thesis: F2 FLOOR BROKEN — XAG ~$64.9 closed below the $67.87 F2 structural floor (Fri 19-Jun) -> 5.3 suspend CONFIRMED. $67.87 flips from support to overhead resistance. Accumulation SUSPENDED by gates (TNX>=4.45 + CPI 4.2% + Warsh hawkish + USDINR PAUSE; V-12 regime-wins). HOLD [size] — no EXIT trigger hit (wkly ~$64.9 > $63 EXIT-ALL; V-18 $52 far below). Re-arm: weekly reclaim >$67.87 + TNX <4.45 + a non-hawkish Fed signal + CPI <3.9

paper_physical.lease_note: ELEVATED regime, no clean live print (LBMA stopped quoting SIFO in 2012; private benchmarks only). Directional: tight.
paper_physical.anchor_note: Shanghai premium % + backwardation direction are structurally reliable; the $68-72 aggregator absolute-spot reads were stale — live spot 18-20 Jun confirms the desk's ~$64.9 (V-26 resolved).

components.label: Futures curve
components.why: Front > deferred = physical scarcity bid; cited as the steepest since the 1980s. Backwardation is the cleanest squeeze tell.

components.label: 1M lease rate
components.why: High cost to borrow metal = tight float. Exact rate PENDING — no public SIFO benchmark since 2012.

components.label: Shanghai premium
components.why: SGE/SHFE > London = metal pulled East; a persistent double-digit premium is real physical tightness.

components.label: COMEX registered
components.why: Immediately-deliverable stock is thin; low registered vs OI = paper leverage. +5.7%/30d is a slight rebuild off a low base.

offsets.label: LBMA vault build
offsets.why: London inventory rebuilding + rising free float is the one genuine loosening signal — watch for the first crack.

invalidation.why: below the 1.0 fib / 40-yr breakout = structural thesis break

floor_zone.why: 1.115 fib + rising diagonal + box + arc confluence — the FINAL-tranche buy zone

exit_zone.why: sits in the 1.618-1.886 fib band — TACTICAL sell zone

dxy_conditionality.rule: the $50-53 floor HOLDS IF DXY rejects its 102-104 multi-year apex; a DXY break > 104 -> expect silver to flush THROUGH $53 toward the $48.18 hard floor.

core_vs_tactical.rule: tranche entry < $60 XAG = CORE (retain — long-term debasement hold); entry >= $60 = TACTICAL (sell into the $75-82 recovery).

current_read.structure: weekly descending channel off the $120.36 blowoff; -48.6% unwound; below all W/D MAs (corrective/defensive); daily swing-low $60/1.474-fib $59.89 holding, MACD flattening.
current_read.posture: DEFENSIVE-HOLD / SUSPENDED. Silver bounced ~7% off the correction low (57.8->61.9), moving AWAY from the $50-53 floor buy-zone -> final ~20k tranche stays parked, NO chase at 61.9/220.55. Structural debasement thesis intact above $47-48. First ceiling $64.4-64.8 (W-SMA + 1.618 tight-fib); a weekly close back above reopens $69-71 -> $75-78 tactical-sell. A daily close below $59.9 re-exposes $56.5 then the $50-53 floor (final tranche arms). DXY 102-104 apex = floor confirm/deny.

final_tranche.placement: at the FLOOR zone, NOT chased at the current ~Rs.206 (SB) / ~$57.8 (XAG)

world_numbers.regime_headline: RED — FIRMER. Warsh's FOMC debut (16-17 Jun) was HAWKISH: the 2026 cut was removed from the dots and the market now prices a HIKE by Oct (V-11 hawkish-transition risk MATERIALIZED). May CPI 4.2% YoY (10-Jun) breached the 3.9% auto-RED ceiling; 10Y real yield 2.19% rising; DXY 100.8 at a fresh 2026 high. XAGUSD ~$64.9 (desk SILVERBEES-derived, Fri 19-Jun) has BROKEN below the $67.87 F2 floor -> 5.3 suspend CONFIRMED (CONFIRMED vs live spot $64.9-65.6 across 18-20 Jun (Investing.com $64.93 19-Jun; Kitco/APMEX ~$65.0-65.6 20-Jun; TradingEconomics $64.26 18-Jun); the $68-72 aggregator reads were STALE — V-26 delta RESOLVED 260621). OFFSET unchanged: positioning washed-out (COT MM +9.8K, 26th pct) + physical TIGHT 4/5 (backwardation, Shanghai +10%, lease elevated) — but V-12 regime-wins: macro forbids new deploys. HOLD [size]; no EXIT trigger hit (wkly ~$64.9 > $63). Credit EASING (CCC 939bp falling); RBI reserves $671.6B now <$680B (gold-reval).
